pi_items.source: task.json description (line 5): 'set up a complete monitoring node called office_env'. Confirmed in setup_task.sh (line 41) and export_result.sh (line 20) which query nodeid='office_env'. Verified in verifier.py.
task.json description lines 7-9 specify these exact input names with initial values 21.5, 45.2, 620. Confirmed in verifier.py line 62: expected_inputs = {'temperature', 'humidity', 'co2'}.

task.json description lines 11-14 list these exact feed names. Confirmed in verifier.py line 80: expected_feeds = {'office_env_temperature', 'office_env_humidity', 'office_env_co2'}. Feed creation with tag 'office_env' verified in export_result.sh line 45.

task.json description line 7-17 specifies this output file path. Confirmed in setup_task.sh line 50 which removes the file, and export_result.sh line 81 which defines CONFIG_FILE variable to this path.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures a sensor monitoring node named 'office_env' with three input channels: temperature, humidity, and co2. Three corresponding PHPFina feeds must be created: office_env_temperature, office_env_humidity, and office_env_co2, each with appropriate units (°C, %, ppm). The agent posts synthetic test data (temperature: 21.5°C, humidity: 45.2%, co2: 620 ppm initially, then 22.1°C, 44.8%, 635 ppm in a second post) and generates a configuration file at /home/ga/sensor_config.json containing feed IDs and last values.
